About Us

Faculty of Art and Design

Founded in 2004 as the Faculty of Fine Arts and renamed in 2011, the Faculty of Art and Design embraces an innovative structure centered on interdisciplinary design and artistic perspectives. By merging creative thinking with academic knowledge, the faculty aims to educate students who will make a difference on the global art and design stage. Our faculty provides a project-based and practice-oriented education across a wide range of fields, from industrial design to architecture, interior design to theater. With access to design studios, model workshops, digital fabrication labs, and performance spaces dedicated to stage arts, students have the opportunity to bring their creativity to life. Guided by expert academics and industry professionals, students engage in workshops, field trips, and professional projects that equip them with the knowledge and skills to compete on a global level. Through our interdisciplinary education model and international collaborations, students develop innovative and solution-oriented approaches in both design and performing arts, ensuring they are well-prepared for strong careers in the industry and academia upon graduation.
